title: selaginella wahauensis
intro: Selaginella wahauensis, also known as the Wahau spikemoss, is a rare and endemic species of a small, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, headache, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Selaginella wahauensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella wahauensis is typically dried and used as a tea, or in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal infusion.
